Page

DaVinciCopilot layout

Da Vinci designer Storybook

Static reference for external design review. Mirrors Maropost playground tokens and copilot Vue components. Toggle theme to compare light and dark surfaces.

Foundations Da Vinci tokens + chrome gradients

Token keys from tokens.json. Gradients below match MpDaVinciBot / DvWidgetDraftCard (not all mapped to tokens yet).

daVinci gradient
daVinci.text
primary
surface
background

Chrome gradients (header strip, avatars, send, New chat): linear-gradient(135deg, #5b8def, #2dd4bf) and header #eef0ff → #f3eafc → #fde8ef (light) / #232a3d → #2d2538 → #3a2530 (dark).

Foundations Typography scale

Eyebrow, panel title, landing title, body, composer.

Eyebrow · 11px semi 600 +1.5px ls
Panel title — 15px / 600
Landing title — 20px / 700
Body / bot intro — 14px / 500
Caption — 12px muted
Foundations Iconography (inline SVG)

App uses Lucide via Vuetify; this file uses minimal SVG stand-ins for size reference.

40px avatar · 14–16px icon
MpDaVinciBot Header — light & dark

Right column uses dark theme variables (preview only; use toggle for global dark).

Da Vinci
Intelligent AI assistant
Da Vinci

Dark header gradient (isolated preview box).

MpDaVinciBot Landing — default & pill hover

What can I help you build?

Ask Da Vinci for a metric, trend, comparison, or table.

Default pill state
Hover state (duplicate)
MpDaVinciBot Chat — user bubble, bot intro, rationale, draft meta
Show revenue by channel for last 30 days
Here are 3 widgets I drafted for Marketing overview.
Why theseYou asked about revenue · last 30 days. I pulled from commerce orders, then drafted a KPI summary and a channel breakdown.
✦ 3 drafts
